preamble.description: Structured preamble: opening formula, citations, recitals (with optional intro) and the final formula ('HAS ADOPTED THIS REGULATION:').

chapters.description: Divisions above the article level (part/title/chapter/section/subsection), typed, with eIds following the EU 'subdivision' authority table used by ELI subdivision URIs (prt_, tit_, cpt_, sct_, sbs_ + the number as published), each with a parent link to its enclosing division.

articles.description: Articles in document order. eIds are ELI-resolvable tokens (art_1, art_16a: number as published). Each article carries num, heading, parent (eId of the nearest enclosing division, or null) and children: par_N for numbered paragraphs, unp_N for unnumbered blocks, with text and the structured 'amendment' field.

annexes.description: Annexes of the legal act, uniform with articles: eId, num, heading and children. Each child has eId (NNN.NNN), text (full readable text), and amendment — null for ordinary content, or a structured object {action: replace|insert|add|delete|amend|null, instruction, amended_act, quoted: [{kind: structure, children: [...]} | {kind: text, text}]} modelled on Akoma Ntoso mod/quotedText/quotedStructure. Tables carry a 'table' key with caption, rows and notes.

structure.description: Nested skeleton of the enacting terms, in document order: division nodes {eId, type, num, children} with article leaves {eId, type: 'article'}. References only — content lives in the flat 'chapters' and 'articles' lists (hybrid flat+tree representation).
